title: Clock edge as result of initial assignment

features.name: reg initialized to 1 with posedge sensitivity at time 0
features.description: Code should include a reg initialized to 1 at declaration with an always block sensitive to posedge of that reg, triggering at simulation start

features.name: initialized clock driving multiple posedge-sensitive blocks
features.description: Code should include a reg initialized to 1 at declaration used as clock for multiple always @(posedge clk) blocks, where some are in submodules
